_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Rheobase (right; unpaired t-test; t48 = 4.05, p<0.001) but not action potential threshold was increased in Nf1+/- (n = 29) putative dopaminergic neurons compared to Nf1+/+ (n = 21)
details: Nf1+/- neurons (n=29) had increased rheobase (171.7±7.779 pA) compared to Nf1+/+ (n=21, 124.1±8.65 pA) (unpaired t-test; t48=4.05, p<0.001)
